description: Our photo banner can make the first birthday of your babies more unforgettable and special, perfectly showing the growth of your cute babies in the past year! Features & Benefits: Simple assemble: First of all, using ribbon to thread the holes of cardstocks. Next, sticking your photos on cardstocks. The steps are easy for you. Wide application: It is fit for various situations such as the decoration of baby‚Äôs room, one-year-old birthday party, nursery, home decoration, baby shower, etc. No matter your baby is girl or boy, it is always an ideal gift. Specifications: Size: cardstocks (w x l): 18 x 13 cm / 7 x 5 inch ribbons: 3 m/9.8 feet Material: made of study and thick cardstocks with high quality Color: silver Quantity: 13 pieces of photo cardstocks and 1 ribbon Package Includes: 13 x photo cardstocks 1 x ribbons 3 x adhesive dots Notice: The cardstocks and ribbons are separate and you should assemble them yourself!
